Score = avg of First-Response & Resolution SLA pass rates. Grade A requires ≥95% SLA + zero active breaches + all priority tiers ≥90%.
IT Health Score
-
-
Composite of 4 weighted
performance components
Component Breakdown
50% SLA  ·  20% Backlog  ·  15% Speed  ·  15% Root Cause  (CSAT excluded)
Performance Trend
Day-over-day movement from automatic daily snapshots - shows whether you're improving or slipping
Executive Insights
Automatically generated from current trends - only shown when the data supports it
Management Recommendations
Action items triggered by current performance conditions
SLA Performance
First Response & Resolution trends, pass/fail mix, priority breach risk
Monthly SLA Trend
First Response & Resolution pass rates over time
SLA Breakdown
Pass / Fail distribution
Priority Escalation Tracker
SLA breach rate by priority level
MTTR & MTTA Trend
Mean Time To Resolve and Mean Time To Acknowledge over time

Intensity of tickets per day

Deeper Analysis
Resolution time spread and category trends over time
Resolution Time Buckets
Tickets grouped by close time ranges
Category Trend Lines
Monthly ticket count per category (Top 4)
Advanced Analytics
Period comparison and volume forecasting - click to expand
Period Comparison
Compare two date ranges side by side - every KPI, category and priority shows the improvement or decline
Period A (baseline)
Period B (compared to A)
Forecast - Next 3 Months
Weighted moving average (3/2/1). Dotted = forecast, solid = historical actuals.
Forecast Table
Predicted ticket volume per category for each of the next 3 months
No ticket data loaded
Upload a CSV report to begin analyzing your helpdesk performance.
Open Ticket SLA Countdown
Live remaining time against target - refreshes automatically every 30 seconds. Close Time is marked Overdue once a ticket has been open longer than its priority's Resolution SLA target (High: 8hr, Medium: 24hr, Low: 72hr).
Predictive SLA Breach Monitor
Open tickets ranked by how soon they'll breach (or already have) their Resolution SLA target
Daily SLA Digest
One-click summary of breached, critical, warning and stale tickets - ready to paste into Outlook for the morning glance.


      
      

        

          
Stale Ticket Monitor 0

          
Open tickets with no activity beyond their priority threshold - these are technically in-SLA but quietly abandoned. The slow-bleed tickets that erode user trust.

Recurring Issue Detector
Tickets grouped by Root Cause tag - surfaces problems that keep coming back

        
Root Cause is tagged per-ticket from the ticket detail modal (Data Audit page → click a row). Untagged tickets are grouped separately so you know how much coverage you have.

      

      

      

        

          
Root Cause Frequency
Ticket count by tagged root cause, current filter

          

        

        

          
Tagging Coverage
How much of the data has a root cause tag

          

            

            

          

        

      

      

        

          
Knowledge Base Opportunity Detector
Root causes with enough volume to justify a self-service KB article

        

        

          Reduction % and hours-saved figures are estimates based on an assumed 30% self-service deflection rate - a common industry rule of thumb, not a measurement from your data. Treat these as planning guidance, not guaranteed outcomes.
        

        

          

            Root Cause
            Ticket Count
            Avg Resolution Time
            Est. Reduction
            Est. Hours Saved
            KB Opportunity

SLA Thresholds by Priority

          
First Response in minutes, Resolution in hours. Each priority tier has its own target.

Stale Ticket Thresholds

          
Flag an open ticket as "stale" when it has had no activity for longer than this many days. Catches abandoned tickets that are still technically within SLA.

          

            
High

            

            
Medium

            

            
Low
